title: SPD 1153 Move Bond — Revised Schedule A from Bond Counsel
summary: Donna Moore confirms items 33-38 are ready. Jimmy Monto notes that the Schedule A for items 33 and 34 (including the SPD 1153 West Fayette Street move plan, $1M bond) has been revised by bond counsel.
raw_content:
[00:28:59] >> Thank you, Madam President. I have items
[00:29:01] 33 through 38. If there's no questions,
[00:29:04] they're ready to go. Hearing
[00:29:07] none. Uh, councelor Moore and Montto.
[00:29:12] >> Council Moore. Oh, this is council
[00:29:14] Montto. I'm sorry. Make sure that the
[00:29:16] clerk speak to the microphone, please.
[00:29:17] >> You know that they changed the um
[00:29:19] schedule A4 33 and 34.
[00:29:22] >> There's a new schedule A in your packet.
[00:29:24] >> Okay. [snorts]
[00:29:25] >> Because Yeah, because the binding
[00:29:27] council had to look at look at review
[00:29:30] and adjust some things.
[00:29:31] >> Okay. Thank you.
[00:29:34] in your packet. There's a new schedule.
[00:29:36] >> Okay.
[00:29:36] >> 33 and 34. Yep.
processing_notes: Schedule A revision is procedural bond counsel adjustment; items 33-34 include the $1M SPD 1153 West Fayette move plan from Feb 4 study session
Segment 5 of 9 from Common Council Study Session, Monday, February 9th, 2026
Transcript corrections applied: national grid -> National Grid
